creator: jason_mann@blueyonder.co.uk
text:
When the ksh93 port is installed, it fails to add itself to /etc/shells.

Aslo, the binary and man file are named ksh93 rather than ksh, although I realise this is probably intentional.

Fix: 

Manually add the entry to /etc/shells, and rename the binary and man file, or create symlinks to them if required.
How-To-Repeat: Install the ksh93 port:

# cd /usr/ports/shells/ksh93
# make install
